summary: Frontend engineer with production experience delivering scalable web applications with React, Next.js (App Router), and TypeScript. Complex UIs, filtering, and business rules—with a focus on performance, SEO, and reliability. Expanding into full stack with Node.js, Python, and AI-assisted engineering.

skills.detail: React, Next.js (App Router), TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6+), Redux Toolkit, Context API, jQuery, HTML5, CSS3, Sass, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion.
Node.js, Express.js, Python, REST APIs, SQL, NoSQL, MongoDB, backend utilities.
DOM, HTTP protocol, responsive design, UI architecture.
Git, GitHub, GitHub Actions, Vercel, Cloudflare.

bullets: Contributed to 116 site builds, 159 content migrations, 28 quality updates, and 80 platform improvements.
Production UI with React, Next.js (App Router), jQuery, and Sass within CMS platforms.
Filtering architectures and promotion logic for complex product catalogs.
Improved Lighthouse and SEO through rendering optimization and component refactors.
Resolved 16 migration defects and complex UI/state issues—stronger release stability.
Scalable React components and filtering systems with Redux Toolkit.
REST API integration for dynamic product features.
SEO and maintainability by refactoring legacy UI.
20+ responsive sites with React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Sass.
Projects from requirements to deployment on Vercel.
Traffic from ~30 to ~2,700 unique users via UI redesign and SEO.
